SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING &QA AND GEN NASHIMOTO--QUALITY ASSURANCE DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOUSSA, ROGER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
